sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14280" key="a)poxalki/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποχαλκ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n14280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strip of brass,</tr_> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of money,</tr_> pun on <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Χαλκίς</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.283</biblScope> </bibl>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
